description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build GEM Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for ice_version and repository_url, and optional secrets for repository credentials. Run a single ubuntu-24.04 job that checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, installs rake, updates the GEM version if specified, builds the GEM package, uploads it as an artifact, and publishes it to a GEM repository if repository_url is provided.
